name: FocusForge
tagline: AI-powered deep work timer for remote engineers
description: FocusForge blocks distractions, schedules focus blocks, and produces a weekly report of deep work hours.

name: ChefMate
tagline: Personalized weekly meal plans from your pantry
description: ChefMate scans your pantry, learns your preferences, and generates a 7-day meal plan with a shopping list.

name: PaperPilot
tagline: Read and summarize academic papers in minutes
description: PaperPilot summarizes PDFs, extracts citations, and builds a personal knowledge graph for researchers.

name: InvoiceOwl
tagline: Invoicing and tax tracking for freelancers
description: InvoiceOwl auto-generates invoices, tracks payments, and estimates quarterly taxes for solo operators.

name: TrailMix
tagline: Crowdsourced hiking conditions in real time
description: TrailMix collects trail condition reports from hikers and surfaces the freshest info for nearby trails.

name: PetPal
tagline: Daily health tracking for cats and dogs
description: PetPal logs feeding, activity, and vet visits, and flags unusual patterns for early intervention.
